memory_objects.title: Superseded registry-only inspect entrypoint with dedicated memo catalog surface

sections.heading: Identity and Recall
sections.summary: Names the audit_event surface, its active recall modes, and its historical current-recall posture.
sections.body: Superseded registry-only inspect entrypoint with dedicated memo catalog surface. The older inspect-entry claim was superseded once source-owned memo catalog surfaces became available. Scope: repo:aoa-memo, project:AoA. Primary recall modes: episodic, source_route. Current recall status: historical because This audit event should be surfaced mainly when tracing why the current entrypoint replaced an older one. Payload ref: docs/LIFECYCLE.md#supersession.

memory_objects.title: Retracted over-strong claim about registry-only memo inspect sufficiency

sections.heading: Identity and Recall
sections.summary: Names the audit_event surface, its active recall modes, and its historical current-recall posture.
sections.body: Retracted over-strong claim about registry-only memo inspect sufficiency. A too-strong claim about the registry as a sufficient long-term inspect surface was retracted after doctrine surfaces and dedicated memo catalogs were added. Scope: repo:aoa-memo, project:AoA. Primary recall modes: episodic, source_route. Current recall status: historical because This audit event remains visible for contradiction and retraction trace-back rather than ordinary semantic recall. Payload ref: docs/LIFECYCLE.md#retraction.
